parameters.query:
SELECT tc.access_token,
       (SELECT array_to_json(array_agg(json_build_object('category_id', category_id, 'category_name', category_name)))
          FROM catalogs.categories
         WHERE marketplace = 'temu_ro' AND is_active = true) AS categories
FROM config.temu_credentials tc
WHERE tc.app_key = 'db98a65eba39bf6886faf56e9249589e'
LIMIT 1;
